items.name: Teable 3.0
items.description: AI Spreadsheet for Business. Turn your business data into AI workflows and custom apps. Connect any system, migrate any data, and build anything that fits your business 100%.

raw_data.tagline: AI Spreadsheet for Business

items.name: PromptQL
items.description: Multiplayer AI that replaces Slack. Stop splitting team knowledge between Slack and everyone's private AI chats. PromptQL is multiplayer AI for teams: think Claude or ChatGPT in shared threads. Tag teammates to review, correct, and refine answers without losing the reasoning. Connect databases, SaaS apps, coding agents, and events. PromptQL captures tribal knowledge and suggests shared-brain updates so context compounds. Scopes and multi-user permissions keep the right context accessible to the right people.

raw_data.tagline: Multiplayer AI that replaces Slack

items.name: AskCodi
items.description: Orchestrate agents at scale while reducing cost. Tell Codi what you want to build. It writes the plan, runs AI agents in parallel across all your projects, and picks the cheapest model that can do each task, so you ship more and spend less. When you add a project it writes the charter and task list itself, and only pulls you in when a decision needs you, through one inbox.

raw_data.tagline: Orchestrate agents at scale while reducing cost

items.name: Moxie Docs: Knowledgebases
items.description: Automated documentation for developers, users, and AI Tools. Now in Beta: Public Sites! Create auto-generated, public-facing help centers and knowledgebases at https://moxiedocs.app. Features rich layouts, white-labelling, full search, and no vendor lock-in. Integrates directly with Changelog! Example: https://docs.moxiedocs.app Also shipped: Webhooks & Slack integration for indexing/PR alerts UI/UX pagination & bulk action improvements DB/infrastructure upgrades for faster loading Continued improvements on document generation quality

raw_data.tagline: Automated documentation for developers, users, and AI Tools

items.name: Wispro
items.description: Stop typing, start talking, get perfectly written text. Wispro turns your voice into writing, instantly. Just talk, messy or unfiltered, and Wispro pastes clean, ready-to-use text directly into whatever you're working on. It adapts to how you think, not just how you speak. Basic Mode captures every word exactly as said. Smart Mode cuts filler words and rambling, formatting it into polished prose. Command Mode turns a spoken instruction into finished writing, emails, replies, whole drafts, on the spot. One voice. Three ways to write.

raw_data.tagline: Stop typing, start talking, get perfectly written text

items.name: Quaso
items.description: AI automation agent to get stuff done across apps or browser. Quaso turns your busywork into automation across all of your apps and the open web. Simply prompt what needs to get done and it builds and sets it up for you. Connects to 3000+ integrations (Gmail, Slack, Linear, Stripe, etc.) and picks up a real browser when there's no native API. Runs on schedules, triggers, and on demand. Fork templates or save any thread as your own reusable skill. Tag @Quaso in Slack so your whole team can put it to work. Just relax and get stuff done.

raw_data.tagline: AI automation agent to get stuff done across apps or browser

items.name: OpenCode Superapp
items.description: The power of Codex with local, self-hosted models and voice. OpenCode Superapp brings the agentic power of Codex to the models and infrastructure you choose. Run cloud, local, or self-hosted models in a native workspace where agents understand your projects, work with files, Git, and terminals, speak with you through voice, and operate Mac apps through supervised Computer Use. Private by design and extensible through skills and MCPs, it gives you capable agents without giving up model choice or control. Built from the ground up with Codex and GPT-5.6.

raw_data.tagline: The power of Codex with local, self-hosted models and voice

items.name: Cosyra 2.0
items.description: A cloud workspace for coding agents from your phone. Cosyra gives you a persistent workspace for cloud agents. Your repos, branches, files, dependencies, terminals, and agent work stay together. Open it from your phone and keep building without leaving a laptop awake.

raw_data.tagline: A cloud workspace for coding agents from your phone

items.name: Basement
items.description: Shopping browser with agentic checkout. Basement is now a shopping browser. Today we launch agentic checkout: your AI shopper finds the best price across the web and buys it for you. Every purchase runs on a single-use card scoped to one order, so your real card is never exposed and nothing goes beyond the budget you set. Every payment lands in one place. Powered by Crossmint. It knows what you like. Now it can buy it. Live on iOS and Chrome.

raw_data.tagline: Shopping browser with agentic checkout

items.name: Basedash AI Kit
items.description: Ship AI analytics in your product, powered by GPT-5.6. Basedash is the AI analytics platform — chat with an AI data analyst, automatic daily insights, automations, and dashboards. Now all of it is available through the API. Power your product's customer-facing analytics with a fully custom UI, or extend your internal BI in ways no tool anticipated. Send a question, stream the answer, render the chart — every query scoped to the right customer. Ranked #1 on BI Bench and powered by GPT-5.6. The AI data analyst, now yours to build on.

raw_data.tagline: Ship AI analytics in your product, powered by GPT-5.6

items.name: Megaphone
items.description: Open-source Mac dictation App that's 100% on-device. Hold Fn, speak, and Megaphone types clean text into any Mac app. Apple’s SpeechAnalyzer transcribes as you talk, while on-device Foundation Models remove fillers, fix self-corrections, adapt to app context, and power inline voice commands. No account, API key, subscription, or server. Free, MIT-licensed, and native to Apple silicon Macs running macOS 26.

raw_data.tagline: Open-source Mac dictation App that's 100% on-device

items.name: AgentLoop
items.description: Starts a fresh Codex worker and critic every cycle. Unlike long-running agent chats, AgentLoop starts a fresh Codex worker and critic every cycle. Set the goal and GUIDELINES.md rubric once; workers build, critics test, and failures become concrete fix notes for the next clean context. Project files carry the memory. Runs stay local, sandboxed, observable, and cancellable from a live dashboard, with ChatGPT control through MCP. Polish mode can continue beyond PASS until the critic says SHIP. Open source and zero-dependency Node.js.

raw_data.tagline: Starts a fresh Codex worker and critic every cycle

items.name: Blaxel Agent Drive
items.description: A shared filesystem for AI agents. Mount one distributed filesystem across multiple sandboxes with concurrent read-write access. Agents can share files, tool outputs, datasets, and context through a normal filesystem path.

raw_data.tagline: A shared filesystem for AI agents

items.name: HOL Guard
items.description: The 1st Firewall for AI Agents. HOL Guard is the firewall for AI agents. It sits between agents and your systems, blocking high-risk actions before they happen like deleting production data to exposing secrets. Built by HOL, it’s free, open source, and already has 400K+ downloads.

raw_data.tagline: The 1st Firewall for AI Agents

items.name: Trend Seeker
items.description: Market research and idea validation from 140K+ signals. Trend Seeker turns recurring demand from Reddit, job ads, podcasts, Google Trends, and product launches into business ideas you can inspect. Each idea shows the problem, source signals, demand trend, competition, opportunity score, and how the cluster changed over time. Browse 7.4K ideas built from 140K+ signals, explore the Demand Map, or validate your own idea against matching user requests. Free to explore, with Pro for full access.

raw_data.tagline: Market research and idea validation from 140K+ signals

items.name: Pulse
items.description: Your company's permission-aware, proactive and agentic brain. Most AI tools start each session blank and answer with no way to check them. Pulse is your company's brain. It connects Slack, email, docs, meetings, and 25 tools into one permission-aware memory, then answers anything with a citation on every line. Decisions get captured once and never re-explained. It finds the right expert, runs agents you approve, builds reports from real data, and works by voice. And it lives inside Claude, Cursor, and ChatGPT over MCP.

raw_data.tagline: Your company's permission-aware, proactive and agentic brain

items.name: Vevey
items.description: A game development tutor now on iOS. Meet Matti, an AI tutor that helps you bring your game ideas to life. We've worked on popular games like https://www.landmarkr.app, and are providing a platform for others to build their own. Create without limits, get instruction on 2D & 3D projects, and even create daily games and puzzles like Landmarkr and Wordle via Game Guides. We'd love to hear from you!

raw_data.tagline: A game development tutor now on iOS

items.name: Drawsy
items.description: An AI workspace where your canvas and code work together.. Drawsy is a virtual collaborative whiteboard tool that lets you easily sketch diagrams that have a hand-drawn feel to them.

raw_data.tagline: An AI workspace where your canvas and code work together.

items.name: Plow Mac App
items.description: Run GPT-5.6 on OpenClaw & Hermes safely on your Mac. Plow is a drag-and-drop installer for OpenClaw and Hermes that’s compatible with GPT-5.6-sol. Everything is configured for you: - Integrated with iMessage, right out of the box. - Easily enable Gmail and Slack integrations, and monitor its usage. - Easily share files with your Plow - so Plow can work on your desktop (with your permission)

raw_data.tagline: Run GPT-5.6 on OpenClaw & Hermes safely on your Mac

items.name: AVE
items.description: Local-first AI video editor for Mac. AVE is a local-first AI video editor for Mac. It helps creators import footage, analyze transcripts and visual notes, search by what appears or is said in clips, then turn selected footage into reviewable timeline work. AVE is useful for launch videos, B-roll search, interview highlights, generated-footage assembly, and private local editing where the project should stay on the Mac by default.

raw_data.tagline: Local-first AI video editor for Mac

items.name: valv
items.description: Your database, safe for agents to query. Connect Postgres, MySQL, ClickHouse and PostHog once. Scope each role down to the row. Your team's agents work on live data and never see more than you allow.

raw_data.tagline: Your database, safe for agents to query

items.name: Fikry
items.description: A mis-trained AI powered by bad data and confidence. I am Fikry. I begin with good intentions, approach the right answer, then confidently miss the exit.

raw_data.tagline: A mis-trained AI powered by bad data and confidence

items.name: Mnemcore
items.description: Turns hours of team video and notes into searchable memory. Mnemcore turns your organization’s video into searchable, shared knowledge. Capture timestamped notes, search across every recording, and ask questions to get grounded answers linked directly to the original moments. Built for teams that rely on video but need a better way to remember, find, and act on what they see.

raw_data.tagline: Turns hours of team video and notes into searchable memory

items.name: Mufal
items.description: Undetectable AI copilot for live meetings. Mufal is a bot-free AI copilot that helps during live meetings—not only afterward. Get live transcription, contextual answers, an undetectable overlay during screen sharing, automatic notes, action items, and durable project memory. It works out of the box with Mufal-managed AI, while advanced users can bring their own API keys. Available on macOS, Windows, and iOS, with a free plan and optional cloud sync.

raw_data.tagline: Undetectable AI copilot for live meetings

items.name: Findborg
items.description: A search engine with no ads. Findborg is a Find Engine -- web search, community knowledge from The Hive, and AI research via Borg, all in one place. No ads. No paid rankings. Businesses get found because they're worth finding.

raw_data.tagline: A search engine with no ads

items.name: Nugget
items.description: Capture your rambles and keep what matters. Capture rambles locally, then organize them into useful ideas with optional cloud processing.

raw_data.tagline: Capture your rambles and keep what matters

items.name: ReExplain
items.description: Explain what you know to AI and discover what you don't. Most AI learning tools explain things to you. ReExplain flips that interaction: instead of AI explaining a concept to you, you explain it to AI in your own words. It listens, asks thoughtful follow-up questions, and helps reveal what you truly understand - and where the gaps are. Your sessions become evidence of your learning, generating focused practice and building a mastery map that grows over time.

raw_data.tagline: Explain what you know to AI and discover what you don't

items.name: Rehello
items.description: Made for introverts to remember people & reconnect naturally. Rehello is a people-memory companion designed for introverts. After meeting someone, jot down a messy memory in your own words. GPT-5.6 turns it into a structured recall card—who they are, where you met, what matters to them, and an easy conversation opener for next time. Unlike a CRM, Rehello isn’t about networking or managing leads. It reduces the mental load of remembering people, so reconnecting feels natural, thoughtful, and less awkward.

raw_data.tagline: Made for introverts to remember people & reconnect naturally

items.name: Astartis x Codex
items.description: Enterprise developer security control plane around evidence. Astartis x Codex - evidence-led developer security control plane.

raw_data.tagline: Enterprise developer security control plane around evidence

items.name: LapuAi
items.description: OS Driver for AI to use computers. Our bet is the mix nobody ships: a chat agent that lives on your real PC, not a VM with the precision of RPA and the range of a real assistant. Most "computer use" tools: OpenAI's Operator, Anthropic's Computer Use take a screenshot, ask an AI where to click, and move the mouse by coordinates, usually on a cloud VM. Reliable computer use comes from talking to the OS directly through its accessibility and UI-automation APIs, not from a smarter model guessing where a button is.

raw_data.tagline: OS Driver for AI to use computers
